mapper.sql: userWalletId, userId, money, alipay, realName, updateDate
mapper.insert: insert into user_wallet (userWalletId, userId, money, alipay, updateDate) values (#{userWalletId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{money,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{alipay,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into user_wallet
userWalletId,
userId,
money,
alipay,
updateDate,
#{userWalletId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{money,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{alipay,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update user_wallet
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
money = #{money,jdbcType=INTEGER},
alipay = #{alipay,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateDate = #{updateDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where userWalletId = #{userWalletId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
UPDATE user_wallet SET money=#{realPayment},updateDate=NOW() WHERE userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT money FROM user_wallet WHERE userId = #{userId}
select concat(money,'') as money, (select price from data_map where idxLabel=7 and nextLabel=1) as leastMoney from user_wallet where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select alipay, realName, concat(money,'') as money from user_wallet where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.update:
update user_wallet
alipay = #{alipay,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
realName = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update user_wallet uw set uw.money = uw.money + #{money,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, uw.updateDate = now() where uw.userId = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select money from user_wallet where userId = #{userId}
SELECT userWalletId, userId, money, realName, alipay, updateDate FROM user_wallet WHERE userId = #{userId}
